description: Celebrate and enhance your feminity with these absolutely stunning and comfortable sandals from catwalk. With it's vibrant colours and sleek design, this pair is perfect for everyday casual wear.UpperSynthetic leather upper with stratigically placed criss-cross straps for enhanced comfort and durabilitySlip on style with a pull loop on the collar for easy on/offOutsoleTPU outsole with floral grooves on the heel for enhanced grip and tractionSandal careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
